mapper.select:
select c.*, e.name masterName, (case when begin_date > now() then 'Not Started' when now() > end_date then 'Ended' else 'In Progress' end ) status from cls c left join emp e on c.master_id = e.id
c.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and c.begin_date between #{begin} and #{end}
order by c.update_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into cls(name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time) values(#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId}, #{subject}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
